definition:
1. a way of spending time : hence, a pastime  (pass-time), amusement , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. serious employment, study , (Aristophanes Comicus), 
3. a way of life, living , δ. ἐν ἀγορᾷ (Aristophanes Comicus) 
4. in bad sense, a waste of time, delay , (Euripides); in plural, (Thucydides) (ML)
